name: Tra-la Coffee Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip stems from figs and cut them into small bits.
2. Combine the figs, eggs, sugar, milk, and shortening. Beat together until well mixed.
3. Sift flour, measure, and sift again with salt and baking powder.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
5. Place paper baking cups into muffin tins. Spoon batter into the cups, filling them about half full.
6. Sprinkle each cup with topping.
7. Bake in a moderately hot oven (375°F) for about 15 minutes or until light brown and firm to touch.
